since_last: 64% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.52%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 64% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.44% · BTC -0.45% · Gold -1.22% · Nasdaq100 -3.29%. 64% of 86 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.52%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.52%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.26%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +3.81%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +3.81%, MU +3.65%, QCOM +2.35%, VRT +2.15%, SMCI +2.04%. Laggards: SAP -2.04%, BABA -1.17%, NOW -1.03%, PLTR -0.98%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.73% at $157.25
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.73% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
